reviews.review_msg: Probably the most unclear prof I've had in the past 3 years. Doesn't like answering questions about exams or essays, if he provides any information it's within days of the due date. Seems irritated by any inquiries made and doesn't make an effort to interact with students. It's clear that he only comes to class to listen to himself talk.

One of the best professors I have ever had,  knowledgeable, funny guy, nice, and he grades fair. If you need clarification, he will talk with you after class or in office hours. Bad ratings seem to be coming from first year students who did poorly. Anyone with a shred of academic ability should find Dr. Boyanowsky's class a joy.
Ehor was a very engaging Professor and was very passionate about the material. If I could take another class with Ehor I would in a heartbeat!

Exams are not fair. There are too many subjective essay questions. I don't know why accounting doesn't deal with numbers in this course. Reading text is useless and u need some common sense to answer questions in the exams.
great teacher.  easy to talk to and very good at making things clear.
the best prof I have ever had
one of the best teachers in business
